primaryCareProvider.name: Dr. Phong Le, MD
primaryCareProvider.practice: Charm City Asian Health Center (Federally Qualified Health Center)
primaryCareProvider.notes: Vietnamese-speaking PCP. Patient established care here 2010 after referral from her workplace screening; previously had episodic care only. Sees Dr. Le every 6 months or so; office uses a phone-based Vietnamese interpreter line as backup when Dr. Le not available.

insurance.name: Medicare Part A + B (since 2019, age 65); supplemental Medicaid (dual-eligible)
insurance.notes: Dual-eligible. Maryland Medicaid covers Part B copays, durable medical equipment, prescriptions not covered by Part D plan. Currently enrolled in WellCare Medicare Part D for prescriptions.

advanceDirectives.healthcareProxy: Son Quang Nguyen (verbal designation, not formally documented prior to admission)
